name: Jade Biosciences, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness. Company Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing novel biologic therapies for patients living with autoimmune diseases. Our goal is to improve meaningfully upon the existing treatment paradigm through the delivery of improved dosing and convenience, a comparable safety profile, and potentially increased clinical activity.
